raw.message:
WE DO NOT KNEEL.
The tournament begins. Give us your best Mortal Kombat katchphrase for a chance to be featured in our fan round-up. #MortalKombatMovie

hook.summary: Introduction and combat sequence of the character Kitana.
hook.visual_action: Kitana poses with her fans and engages in fast-paced combat in two different environments.

scene_flow: Kitana is introduced in a dark arena holding her signature bladed fans.
Transition to a jungle fight where Kitana strikes an opponent.
Return to the arena for a sequence of acrobatic fan attacks and sweeps.
Close-up of Kitana throwing and catching her fan as the scene ends.
audience_proxy: Male gamers and action movie fans aged 18-35 who enjoy high-intensity combat.
